name: button-group-select
visual_summary: Button Group Select is a collection of clickable buttons that allow a user to make a selection from a set of options. It consists of a container with multiple buttons that can be grouped together. This component is ideal for situations where multiple options need to be presented to the user.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-group-select
Description: Button Group Select is a collection of clickable buttons that allow a user to make a selection from a set of options. It consists of a container with multiple buttons that can be grouped together. This component is ideal for situations where multiple options need to be presented to the user.
Style: e.g. rounded, flat, elevated
Interactions: e.g. click, toggle, radio
Tags: button, group, select, multiple selection, options

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
